topic: Small handprints appear on the inside of my back windows every morning.
title: Small Handprints On My Back Window Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning there were small handprints on the inside of my back windows.
scenes.image_prompt: a car back window from inside, small smudged child handprints on the fogged glass, dim grey dawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drive alone. No kids. The doors lock automatically.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty back seat of a sedan, neat and bare, faint morning light through tinted windows, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cleaned them off every day.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand wiping a streaked back window with a cloth, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then they started appearing higher, like the hands were growing.
scenes.image_prompt: handprints smeared near the top corner of a car window, overcast light through glass, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I parked under a streetlight and watched all night.
scenes.image_prompt: a car parked beneath a flickering streetlamp at night, empty road, deep shadow, headlights off, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three in the morning the glass fogged from a breath inside.
scenes.image_prompt: a car window fogging over from the inside, a single streetlamp glow, dark cabin, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I aimed my phone camera at the empty back seat.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone propped on a dashboard pointing toward a dark empty back seat, faint screen glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage showed the prints forming. No hand. Just the prints.
scenes.image_prompt: a grainy phone screen showing a car interior, smudges appearing on glass, distorted low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next night, the prints pressed outward, reaching toward the front.
scenes.image_prompt: handprints stretched along the side window pulling toward the driver area, dim cabin, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then one tiny print appeared on my shoulder, from behind.
scenes.image_prompt: a driver seat from behind, a faint small handprint on the dark fabric of the shoulder, dim dashboard glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sold the car. I still feel them reaching.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty driveway at dusk where a car used to be, oil stain on concrete, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My new car had handprints too, before I had even driven it.
scenes.image_prompt: a brand new car interior with small smudged handprints on the rear glass, showroom light dimmed, vertical 9:16 framing
